fields.name: TAGHEADER0
fields.description:
Default header for NFC tag. Software can read these values to
populate NFCID1_3RD_LAST, NFCID1_2ND_LAST and NFCID1_LAST.

fields.description:
Default header for NFC tag. Software can read these values to
populate NFCID1_3RD_LAST, NFCID1_2ND_LAST and NFCID1_LAST.
